titleZh: 知返：AI 改的代码，真正学回来
titleEn: AhaDiff: Actually Learn What AI Changed

scenes.titleZh: AI 帮你改代码，但你学到了什么？
scenes.titleEn: AI Changed Your Code — Did You Learn Anything?
scenes.kickerEn: The knowledge gap of vibe coding
scenes.narrationZh: 现在很多人用 AI 助手写代码。Cursor、Claude Code、Copilot，一天能改几十个文件。你 commit 了，代码能跑了，但你真的知道改了什么吗？这就是 vibe coding 的知识黑洞：AI 帮你实现了功能，但这些改动从来没有变成你自己的知识。下次遇到类似问题，你还是得再问 AI。知返就是为了解决这个问题而做的。
scenes.narrationEn: Lots of people now use AI assistants to write code. Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot. You can change dozens of files in a day. You committed, the code runs, but do you really know what changed? This is the knowledge gap of vibe coding. AI implements the feature, but the changes never become your own knowledge. Next time you face a similar problem, you still have to ask AI again. AhaDiff exists to solve this.
scenes.subtitleZh: AI 改了代码，但改动没变成你的知识。
scenes.subtitleEn: AI changed the code, but changes never became your knowledge.

scenes.titleEn: CLI: Start Learning in Three Steps
scenes.narrationZh: 使用知返非常简单。知返目前还没发布到 PyPI，在源码目录里用 uv tool install --editable . 安装命令行，或者直接用 uv run ahadiff 运行。安装好之后，进入你的项目目录，运行 ahadiff init 初始化。然后 AI 帮你改完代码后，运行 ahadiff learn 加上你要学习的提交范围。比如 HEAD~1..HEAD 就是学最近一次提交，加 --staged 就是学暂存区的改动，加 --unstaged 就是学工作区还没 add 的改动。你还可以用 --changed-path 指定只学某个文件。学完以后，用 ahadiff serve 打开网页界面查看结果。Guide 页面列出了所有命令，包括 quiz、review、verify、improve 等，还有进阶的数据库维护和概念管理命令。
scenes.narrationEn: Using AhaDiff is simple. AhaDiff is not published on PyPI yet. In a source checkout, install the CLI with uv tool install --editable dot, or run directly with uv run ahadiff. After installation, go to your project directory and run ahadiff init to initialize. Then, after AI changes your code, run ahadiff learn with the commit range you want to study. For example, HEAD tilde one to HEAD means the latest commit. Add --staged to learn staged changes, or --unstaged to learn working directory changes. You can also use --changed-path to learn a specific file. After learning, run ahadiff serve to open the web UI and view results. The Guide page lists all commands including quiz, review, verify, improve, plus advanced database maintenance and concept management commands.
scenes.subtitleEn: uv install, init, learn — three steps to start.

scenes.titleZh: 看改动：每句解释都指向代码
scenes.titleEn: View Changes: Every Explanation Points to Code
scenes.kickerZh: 不是摘要，是带证据的解释
scenes.narrationZh: 知返不是给你生成一段 commit 摘要就完了。它的核心思想是带证据的学习：课程里每一句话都必须指向具体的文件和行号。打开 Diff 页面，你能看到这次代码改动，左侧有彩色小圆点标记课程提到的代码行。点击圆点，右侧的检查面板会显示对应的解释和代码片段。每条结论有五种验证状态：已验证、较弱、未证明、被反驳、已拒绝。这样你学到的不是模型的幻觉，而是可以追溯到代码的真实知识。
scenes.narrationEn: AhaDiff does not just generate a commit summary. Its core idea is learning with evidence: every sentence in the lesson must point to a specific file and line number. Open the Diff page and you see the code changes with colored dots marking lines mentioned in the lesson. Click a dot and the inspector panel shows the explanation and code snippet. Each conclusion has five verification statuses: verified, weak, not proven, contradicted, and rejected. What you learn is not hallucination but real knowledge traceable to code.
scenes.subtitleZh: 点击 Diff 圆点，看每句话对应的代码。
scenes.subtitleEn: Click Diff dots to see the code behind each claim.

scenes.titleZh: 读课程：三档深度随你选
scenes.kickerZh: 完整、提示、精简三档课程
scenes.narrationZh: Lesson 页面展示这次改动的完整课程。知返会生成三档课程：完整版适合深入学习，提示版只保留关键点，精简版用最少的篇幅概括改动。课程顶部会显示这次学习的评分和通过状态。你可以点击「看评分细节」进入评分页面，或者点击「看 LLM 评审」查看模型的语义评审意见。这些评分和评审帮你判断这次生成的课程质量是否可靠。
scenes.narrationEn: The Lesson page shows the full lesson for this change. AhaDiff generates three tiers: full for deep learning, hint for key points only, and compact for a minimal summary. The top of the lesson shows the score and pass status. You can click View Score Details to see the scoring breakdown, or View LLM Review to see the model's semantic review. These scores help you judge whether the generated lesson is reliable.
scenes.subtitleZh: 三档课程，评分和评审帮你判断质量。
scenes.subtitleEn: Three lesson tiers, scores and reviews for quality judgment.

scenes.titleZh: 测验和复习：记住学过的东西
scenes.titleEn: Quiz and Review: Remember What You Learned
scenes.kickerZh: 选择题测验 + 间隔重复复习
scenes.narrationZh: 光读课程很容易忘。知返用两种方式帮你记住：Quiz 页面会出选择题，你得自己想答案，这叫主动回忆，比被动阅读有效得多。做完测验后，知识点会变成复习卡片。Review 页面用间隔重复算法安排复习时间，在你快要忘记的时候提醒你复习。每张卡片按掌握程度打分，系统自动调整下次复习间隔。这里展示的是我本地开发测试时积累的数据，你安装知返后需要自己运行 learn 命令才会生成属于你的课程和卡片。
scenes.narrationEn: Just reading lessons is easy to forget. AhaDiff helps you remember in two ways. The Quiz page shows multiple-choice questions where you must think of the answer yourself. This is called active recall, much more effective than passive reading. After the quiz, knowledge points become review cards. The Review page uses a spaced repetition algorithm to schedule reviews right before you forget. Each card is rated by mastery level, and the system adjusts the next review interval automatically. The data shown here is from my local development testing. After you install AhaDiff, you need to run the learn command yourself to generate your own lessons and cards.
scenes.subtitleZh: 测验帮你回忆，复习帮你不忘。
scenes.subtitleEn: Quizzes help you recall, reviews help you retain.

scenes.titleZh: 评分详情：8 个维度看课程质量
scenes.titleEn: Score Details: 8 Dimensions of Lesson Quality
scenes.kickerZh: 每个维度都有明确含义
scenes.kickerEn: Each dimension has a clear purpose
scenes.narrationZh: 知返用 8 个维度给每次学习打分，满分 100。准确性看课程内容是否正确；证据绑定看每句话有没有对应的代码来源；差异覆盖看课程是否覆盖了这次改动的主要文件；可学习性看课程是否适合学习；测验迁移看测验题和课程内容是否对应；规范对齐看是否满足你指定的学习要求；简洁性看篇幅是否合理；安全与隐私看有没有泄露敏感信息。其中准确性和证据绑定有硬门槛，低于门槛直接判定不合格。你可以在运行详情页面的评分和评审标签页查看每个维度的具体分数和 LLM 评审意见。
scenes.narrationEn: AhaDiff scores each learning session on 8 dimensions, out of 100. Accuracy checks whether lesson content is correct. Evidence checks if every claim has a code source. Diff coverage checks if the lesson covers the main changed files. Learnability checks if the lesson is suitable for learning. Quiz transfer checks if quiz questions match the lesson. Spec alignment checks if your specified learning requirements are met. Conciseness checks if the length is reasonable. Safety and privacy checks for sensitive information leaks. Accuracy and evidence have hard gates. Below the threshold means automatic failure. You can view each dimension's score and the LLM review on the Run Detail page's Score and Judge tabs.
scenes.subtitleZh: 8 维评分，准确性和证据有硬门槛。
scenes.subtitleEn: 8-dimension scoring, accuracy and evidence have hard gates.

scenes.titleZh: 概念图谱：知识越学越多
scenes.titleEn: Concept Graph: Knowledge Grows Over Time
scenes.kickerZh: 每次学习都在充实你的知识地图
scenes.kickerEn: Every learning session enriches your knowledge map
scenes.narrationZh: 知返不只是学一次就丢。每次学习都会提取新的概念，累积到概念台账里。台账页面展示所有学过的知识点、它们的来源文件和健康状态。切换到图谱视图，你能看到概念之间的关系网络，节点是知识点，边是它们的关联。这张图会随着你学习更多的代码改动不断生长。这里的数据是我本地测试积累的，你需要在自己的项目里运行 learn 才会逐渐生成属于你的概念图谱。顺便说一下，知返的概念累积设计借鉴了 Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 思路和 Graphify 代码图谱工具，但落地为按 diff 维度叠加的学习层。
scenes.narrationEn: AhaDiff does not discard what you learned. Each session extracts new concepts accumulated in the concept ledger. The ledger page shows all knowledge points, their source files, and health status. Switch to the graph view to see the relationship network. Nodes are knowledge points, edges are their connections. This graph grows as you learn more code changes. The data here is from my local testing. You need to run learn in your own project to gradually build your own concept graph. By the way, the concept accumulation design draws from Karpathy's LLM Wiki idea and the Graphify code graph tool, landed as a diff-level learning overlay.
scenes.subtitleZh: 概念台账和图谱，随着学习不断生长。
scenes.subtitleEn: Concept ledger and graph grow as you learn more.

scenes.titleZh: 追踪进展和个性化配置
scenes.kickerZh: 运行面板看趋势，设置页配模型
scenes.kickerEn: Dashboard for trends, Settings for model config
scenes.narrationZh: 运行面板展示你所有的学习记录、总分趋势和待复习数量。你能看到哪些学习通过了，哪些没通过，分数是上升还是下降。设置页面用来配置你自己的 LLM provider，支持 OpenAI、Gemini、Anthropic 等多种格式，填上接口地址和密钥就行。你也可以用 ahadiff doctor 检查环境、用 ahadiff config show --resolved 查看当前配置。知返还支持 13 种 AI 编码工具的项目级集成，包括 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot、Codex 等，一条 ahadiff install 命令就能写入对应工具的指引文件。所有学习记录都保存在你的项目目录里，模型调用由你自己配置和管理。
scenes.narrationEn: The Dashboard shows all your learning sessions, score trends, and cards due for review. You can see which sessions passed or failed, and whether scores are trending up or down. The Settings page lets you configure your own LLM provider. It supports OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic and other formats. Just fill in the endpoint and your key. You can also run ahadiff doctor to check your environment, or ahadiff config show --resolved to see the current configuration. AhaDiff supports project-level integration with 13 AI coding tools including Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and Codex. One ahadiff install command writes the guidance file for each tool. All learning records are saved in your project directory, and model calls are configured and managed by you.
scenes.subtitleZh: 运行面板看记录，设置里配模型和工具集成。
scenes.subtitleEn: Dashboard for records, Settings for model and tool integration.

scenes.narrationZh: 总结一下。知返解决的核心问题是：AI 帮你改了代码，但你没有从中学到东西。它用带证据的学习方式，确保你学到的是真实的、可以追溯到代码的知识。在源码目录里用 uv tool install 安装知返，运行 ahadiff init 初始化项目，配置你的模型 provider，然后对最近的一次改动运行 learn。打开网页看课程、查证据、做测验、定期复习。知返还支持 13 种 AI 编码工具的项目级集成，让你的 AI 助手也知道怎么使用知返。让 AI 负责写代码，让知返把知识还给你。
scenes.narrationEn: To summarize. AhaDiff solves the core problem: AI changed your code, but you did not learn from it. It uses evidence-based learning to ensure what you learn is real knowledge traceable to code. In a source checkout, install with uv tool install, run ahadiff init to initialize, configure your model provider, then run learn on a recent change. Open the web UI to read lessons, check evidence, take quizzes, and review periodically. AhaDiff also supports project-level integration with 13 AI coding tools, so your AI assistants know how to use AhaDiff too. Let AI write code. Let AhaDiff return the knowledge to you.
scenes.subtitleZh: 让 AI 写代码，让知返把知识还给你。
scenes.subtitleEn: Let AI write code. Let AhaDiff return the knowledge to you.
